headline: Citizens launches transportation coverage, names FedEx a top large-cap pick
summary: Investing.com -- Citizens initiated coverage of the Transportation, Logistics & Services group with twenty-two names, naming FedEx among its top large-cap picks alongside FTAI Aviation, Union Pacific and C.H. Robinson, according to a note from analyst Jeff Kauffman.

headline: New Ownership of Pak Mail in San Marcos, Texas Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Building Upon More than 20 Years of Operation
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in San Marcos, TX to new owner, Zach Shifrin. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail location since 2003.

headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Allstate, AMC Entertainment, Boeing, CAVA Group, Check Point Software, Digital Realty Trust, FedEx, IBM, UPS, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after a nice bounce-back day for Wall Street, as a tepid June consumer price index report, combined with the President dropping the big Strait of Hormuz tolls, brought buyers back to the table. headline: Citizens Initiates Coverage On FedEx with Market Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $375

headline: Longleaf Partners Global Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Global food delivery platform Delivery Hero was a contributor for the quarter. French pay-TV operator Canal+ contributed positively in the quarter.
